overall.description: A computer-generated animation depicting the aurora borealis dancing across a starry night sky, viewed from a forest clearing. The camera slowly pans right as the green and teal northern lights shimmer and flow through the sky, with silhouetted trees framing the bottom of the shot.

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the night sky, watching the aurora borealis

entered.detail: dark silhouette of deciduous trees against the night sky
dense cluster of tree silhouettes framing the center bottom
tall tree silhouettes on the right side of the frame
shimmering green and teal northern lights flowing across the left side of the sky
faint band of stars and cosmic dust stretching across the night sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a tranquil forest clearing at night, with silhouetted trees framing the bottom of the shot. The aurora borealis glows vividly in green and teal hues on the left side of the sky, while the Milky Way stretches across the center. The camera slowly begins panning right, revealing more of the starry sky.

events.description: aurora borealis shifts from left side to center of the sky, changing shape and intensity

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the sky as the aurora drifts overhead

entered.detail: new tree silhouettes entering from the right edge as camera pans

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow rightward pan, the aurora borealis drifts toward the center of the sky, its green ribbons swirling and changing shape. The tree silhouettes shift leftward in the frame, with new trees entering from the right. The Milky Way remains visible in the background as the aurora's glow intensifies in the center.

events.description: aurora borealis completes its movement to the right side of the sky, forming a bright curtain of light

agents.ego_description: watching the aurora settle into the right portion of the sky while the pan continues

entered.detail: additional tree silhouettes entering from the far right

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the aurora borealis has shifted to dominate the right side of the sky, creating a brilliant curtain of green light. The leftmost tree cluster has exited the frame, while new trees continue to enter from the right. The camera maintains its steady rightward pan, capturing the ethereal glow of the northern lights against the star-filled sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous rightward pan across a starry night sky where the aurora borealis gradually shifts its position over a silhouetted forest. It begins in a tranquil clearing with vivid green and teal lights glowing on the left while the Milky Way stretches across the center. As the camera glides right, the aurora drifts toward the middle of the frame, its ribbons swirling and intensifying in brightness while the tree silhouettes shift leftward. The scene then expands further to the right, causing the initial cluster of trees to exit the frame as new silhouettes enter from the edge. Finally, the aurora transforms into a brilliant curtain of light dominating the right side of the sky against the backdrop of the star-filled expanse.
